checks.note: The `checks` field is typed as `list[dict[str, Any]]` but represents a list of check results with a known schema (id, pass, annotations, etc.). The codebase already defines `CheckResult` as a TypedDict for this shape. Using `list[CheckResult]` would make the type annotation more precise and self-documenting.

annotations.message: Consider `list[CheckResult]` instead of `list[dict[str, Any]]` — the schema is known and already modeled by CheckResult.
